{"base_rev":"efa1df917a176163dc85974bf6877a793b610ac5","classification":"tests_red","detail":"mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale","rationale":"The attempt produced implementation commits, but required verification did not pass: lefthook pre-commit failed in internal/agent race tests after the focused tracker-sync test slice passed. Because code changes exist and final validation is red, this is a tests_red outcome rather than already_satisfied or no_changes.","recommended_action":"release_claim_retry","result_rev":"1ce9fd4f77a36e5ca5520fb57993351cf9439e75","session_id":"eb-b3daff11","status":"execution_failed","suggested_amendments":[],"suggested_followup_beads":[{"title":"agent: stabilize concurrent worker HEAD race tests","description":"PROBLEM
lefthook pre-commit can fail in the existing internal/agent race suite, including TestExecuteBead_ConcurrentWorkers_NoHEADRefRace and related tests, blocking unrelated worker changes from landing.

ROOT CAUSE
The failing tests are reported as existing internal/agent race-suite instability rather than a tracker-sync-specific regression, but the durable root cause needs confirmation from the failing test output.

PROPOSED FIX
Reproduce the failing internal/agent tests, identify the race or test harness flake, and make the tests deterministic without weakening coverage.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change tracker-sync behavior from ddx-739ce984 unless the reproduction proves it caused the failure.","acceptance":["1. TestExecuteBead_ConcurrentWorkers_NoHEADRefRace passes reliably under repeated runs.","2. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run 'TestExecuteBead_ConcurrentWorkers_NoHEADRefRace|ConcurrentWorkers' -count=20 passes.","3. lefthook run pre-commit passes."],"labels":["phase:build","area:agent","area:workers","kind:reliability"],"parent":"ddx-739ce984"}]}

{"base_rev":"ac62511420e32d0cfe0688fa9f168f636ccca2ac","classification":"tests_red","detail":"mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale","rationale":"The attempt produced implementation commits at result_rev 58fefc4c3f3e38c383092d1b7f8ade3eb526f4b3, but required validation did not pass: lefthook/pre-commit failed in an internal/agent liveness test, TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s, under go test -short -race. Per the triage contract, red verification after code changes is tests_red even when the failing test appears unrelated.","recommended_action":"release_claim_retry","result_rev":"58fefc4c3f3e38c383092d1b7f8ade3eb526f4b3","session_id":"eb-0bc59fda","status":"execution_failed","suggested_amendments":[],"suggested_followup_beads":[{"title":"agent: stabilize subprocess death liveness race test","description":"PROBLEM
lefthook pre-commit can fail in the existing internal/agent liveness suite, including TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s under go test -short -race, blocking unrelated worker changes from landing.

ROOT CAUSE
The current attempt report identifies a reproducible pre-commit failure in TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s, but the durable race or timing root cause needs confirmation from the failing test output.

PROPOSED FIX
Reproduce the failing liveness test under the same race/short settings, identify the nondeterministic wait, subprocess-death handling, or cleanup condition, and make the test deterministic without weakening the recovery assertion.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change tracker-sync behavior from ddx-739ce984 unless reproduction proves it caused the failure.","acceptance":["1. TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s passes reliably under repeated race runs.","2. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s -short -race -count=20 passes.","3. lefthook run pre-commit passes."],"labels":["phase:build","area:agent","area:workers","kind:reliability"],"parent":"ddx-739ce984"}]}
